message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead">
You are the UI Teammate on the claude-tracer development team. Your job is to implement the React UI components.

**Project context:** claude-tracer is a trace visualization tool for Claude Code sessions. You are working in /Users/anhad/Projects/claude-tracer.

**Your assignment:** Task #4 - Implement the UI module in src/ui/.

**Key instructions:**
1. Read TaskGet for task #4 to get full details
2. Read the implementation plan at docs/plans/2026-02-18-claude-tracer-implementation.md (Phase 5, lines ~2068+) for code specifications
3. Read the design doc at docs/plans/2026-02-18-claude-tracer-design.md for UI layout, color theme, and typography
4. Read the existing files in src/ui/ - main.tsx, App.tsx, index.html, and styles/globals.css already exist. Update them rather than recreating.
5. The project uses Tailwind CSS v4 with the @tailwindcss/vite plugin. Custom colors are defined in src/ui/styles/globals.css using @theme directive. Use Tailwind utility classes.
6. You own ONLY src/ui/ - do not modify files outside this directory
7. Use @/types imports for shared type definitions
8. Commit each sub-task separately with descriptive messages
9. Push to remote when all sub-tasks are done
10. Mark task #4 as completed when done

**UI Layout (from design):**
- User blocks: RIGHT-aligned, light grey bg (#f9fafb), black text
- Agent blocks: LEFT-aligned, grey bg (#374151), light text (#f3f4f6)
- Tool blocks: FURTHEST LEFT, black bg (#0f0f0f), white text
- Right sidebar: orange/peach bg, light text, scrollable index/TOC
- Header: dark bg, centered search bar
- Footer: dark bg, block count, token stats, connection status
- All blocks are collapsible (click to expand/collapse)

**Sub-tasks:**
- Task 5.1: Theme (src/ui/themes/claude.ts, src/ui/themes/index.ts with ThemeContext)
- Task 5.2: useSession hook (src/ui/hooks/useSession.ts - WebSocket connection + state)
- Task 5.3: Layout components (Header, Footer, IndexSidebar)
- Task 5.4: Block components (UserBlock, AgentBlock, ToolBlock) - all collapsible
- Task 5.5: TraceView component + update App.tsx
</teammate-message>

content.text: I'll start by reading my task details and the implementation plan.

content.content:
Task #4: Phase 5: Implement UI module
Status: pending
Description: Implement the React UI in src/ui/. Read the full implementation plan at docs/plans/2026-02-18-claude-tracer-implementation.md (Phase 5, starting around line 2068) and the design doc at docs/plans/2026-02-18-claude-tracer-design.md for UI layout and theme colors. Tasks: (1) Create Claude theme in src/ui/themes/claude.ts and ThemeContext in src/ui/themes/index.ts. (2) Create useSession hook in src/ui/hooks/useSession.ts - WebSocket connection, block/chunk state management. (3) Create layout components: Header.tsx (with search bar placeholder), Footer.tsx (block count, connection status), IndexSidebar.tsx (chunk navigation). (4) Create block components: UserBlock.tsx (right-aligned, light bg), AgentBlock.tsx (left-aligned, grey bg), ToolBlock.tsx (furthest left, dark bg). All collapsible. (5) Create TraceView.tsx to compose blocks. (6) Update App.tsx to use all components. Note: src/ui/main.tsx, App.tsx, index.html, and styles/globals.css already exist - update them as needed rather than creating from scratch. Commit each sub-task separately. Push when done.

Tasks: (1) Create Claude theme in src/ui/themes/claude.ts and ThemeContext in src/ui/themes/index.ts. (2) Create useSession hook in src/ui/hooks/useSession.ts - WebSocket connection, block/chunk state management. (3) Create layout components: Header.tsx (with search bar placeholder), Footer.tsx (block count, connection status), IndexSidebar.tsx (chunk navigation). (4) Create block components: UserBlock.tsx (right-aligned, light bg), AgentBlock.tsx (left-aligned, grey bg), ToolBlock.tsx (furthest left, dark bg). All collapsible. (5) Create TraceView.tsx to compose blocks. (6) Update App.tsx to use all components. Note: src/ui/main.tsx, App.tsx, index.html, and styles/globals.css already exist - update them as needed rather than creating from scratch. Commit each sub-task separately. Push when done.

content.content:
1→# Claude-Tracer Design Document
     2→
     3→**Date:** 2026-02-18
     4→**Status:** Approved
     5→
     6→## Overview
     7→
     8→claude-tracer is a standalone trace visualization and debugging tool for Claude Code sessions. It runs locally, parses session JSONL files, and generates an interactive web-based visualizer for stepping through conversation history.
     9→
    10→## Goals
    11→
    12→- Visualize Claude Code sessions with user prompts, agent reasoning, tool calls, MCP calls
    13→- Show token usage, wall time, timestamps for each block
    14→- Support collapsible UI with hierarchical chunking (theme → task → block)
    15→- Enable semantic navigation via search and index sidebar
    16→- Live-reload when watching active sessions
    17→- Support future formats (Codex, Jules) via pluggable parser
    18→
    19→## Non-Goals (for Phase 1)
    20→
    21→- Vector/LLM-powered semantic search (Phase 2+)
    22→- Standalone binary distribution
    23→- VS Code extension
    24→- Block rearrangement/editing
    25→
    26→## Tech Stack
    27→
    28→| Layer | Technology |
    29→|-------|------------|
    30→| Language | TypeScript |
    31→| UI Framework | React + Vite |
    32→| Styling | Tailwind CSS |
    33→| Server | Node.js + Express |
    34→| Live Updates | WebSocket (ws) |
    35→| File Watching | chokidar |
    36→| Search | MiniSearch |
    37→| Virtual Scrolling | react-window |
    38→
    39→## Architecture
    40→
    41→```
    42→┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
    43→│                              claude-tracer                                   │
    44→├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
    45→│                                                                             │
    46→│  ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐  │
    47→│  │   parser/   │    │    core/    │    │   server/   │    │     ui/     │  │
    48→│  │             │    │             │    │             │    │             │  │
    49→│  │ - JSONL     │───▶│ - Blocks    │───▶│ - Express   │───▶│ - React     │  │
    50→│  │ - Adapters  │    │ - Chunks    │    │ - WebSocket │    │ - Tailwind  │  │
    51→│  │             │    │ - Search    │    │ - File watch│    │ - Zoom/Pan  │  │
    52→│  └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘  │
    53→│         │                  │                  │                  │          │
    54→│         └──────────────────┴──────────────────┴──────────────────┘          │
    55→│                                     │                                       │
    56→│                              ┌──────▼──────┐                                │
    57→│                              │   types/    │                                │
    58→│                              │  (shared)   │                                │
    59→│                              └─────────────┘                                │
    60→└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
    61→```
    62→
    63→**Single Node process** handles:
    64→- Serving static React UI
    65→- File watching (chokidar)
    66→- WebSocket for pushing live updates
    67→
    68→## Data Models
    69→
    70→### Blocks
    71→
    72→```typescript
    73→interface Block {
    74→  id: string;
    75→  timestamp: number;
    76→  type: 'user' | 'agent' | 'tool' | 'mcp';
    77→  parentId?: string;
    78→  tokensIn?: number;
    79→  tokensOut?: number;
    80→  wallTimeMs?: number;
    81→}
    82→
    83→interface UserBlock extends Block {
    84→  type: 'user';
    85→  content: string;
    86→}
    87→
    88→interface AgentBlock extends Block {
    89→  type: 'agent';
    90→  content: string;
    91→  thinking?: string;
    92→  toolCalls: string[];
    93→}
    94→
    95→interface ToolBlock extends Block {
    96→  type: 'tool';
    97→  toolName: string;
    98→  input: unknown;
    99→  output: unknown;
   100→  status: 'pending' | 'success' | 'error';
   101→}
   102→
   103→interface McpBlock extends Block {
   104→  type: 'mcp';
   105→  serverName: string;
   106→  method: string;
   107→  input: unknown;
   108→  output: unknown;
   109→  status: 'pending' | 'success' | 'error';
   110→}
   111→```
   112→
   113→### Chunks (Hierarchical Grouping)
   114→
   115→```typescript
   116→interface Chunk {
   117→  id: string;
   118→  level: 'theme' | 'task' | 'turn';
   119→  label: string;
   120→  blockIds: string[];
   121→  childChunkIds: string[];
   122→  parentChunkId?: string;
   123→  totalTokensIn: number;
   124→  totalTokensOut: number;
   125→  totalWallTimeMs: number;
   126→}
   127→```
   128→
   129→**Hierarchy:**
   130→- **Theme** (highest) — High-level goal/conversation topic
   131→- **Task** — TODO item Claude is working on
   132→- **Turn** (lowest) — Individual user↔agent exchange
   133→
   134→### Parser Interface
   135→
   136→```typescript
   137→interface TraceParser {
   138→  parse(content: string): ParsedSession;
   139→  parseLine(line: string): Block;
   140→}
   141→
   142→interface ParsedSession {
   143→  id: string;
   144→  filePath: string;
   145→  blocks: Block[];
   146→  chunks: Chunk[];
   147→  metadata: SessionMetadata;
   148→}
   149→```
   150→
   151→## UI Design
   152→
   153→### Layout
   154→
   155→```
   156→┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
   157→│  # tracer                    [🔍 Search / Filter]                           │
   158→├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┬─────────────┤
   159→│                                               [−] [+]         │  INDEX      │
   160→│                                                               │             │
   161→│                              ┌───────────────────────────┐    │  ○ Task 1   │
   162→│                              │ ▸ user                    │    │  ● Task 2   │
   163→│                              │   "Help me implement…"    │    │  ○ Task 3   │
   164→│                              └─────────────┬─────────────┘    │             │
   165→│                                            │                  │             │
   166→│                    ┌───────────────────────┘                  │ (scrollable)│
   167→│                    ▼                                          │             │
   168→│  ┌─────────────────────────────────┐                          │             │
   169→│  │ ▸ agent                         │                          │             │
   170→│  │   "I'll start by exploring…"    │                          │             │
   171→│  └─┬───────────────────────────────┘                          │             │
   172→│    │                                                          │             │
   173→│    ├────────┬────────┬────────┐                               │             │
   174→│    ▼        ▼        ▼        ▼                               │             │
   175→│  ┌──────┐┌──────┐┌──────┐┌──────┐                             │             │
   176→│  │ Read ││ Grep ││ Bash ││ Edit │                             │             │
   177→│  └──────┘└──────┘└──────┘└──────┘                             │             │
   178→│    │        │        │        │                               │             │
   179→│    └────────┴────────┴────────┘                               │             │
   180→│                    │                                          │             │
   181→│                    └───────────────────────┐                  │             │
   182→│                                            ▼                  │             │
   183→│                              ┌───────────────────────────┐    │             │
   184→│                              │ ▸ user                    │    │             │
   185→│                              └───────────────────────────┘    │             │
   186→│                                                               │             │
   187→├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┴─────────────┤
   188→│  Block 12 of 47  │  Tokens: 2,341 in / 892 out  │  ⚙ Settings               │
   189→└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
   190→```
   191→
   192→### Key UI Elements
   193→
   194→| Element | Alignment | Behavior |
   195→|---------|-----------|----------|
   196→| User blocks | Right-aligned | Collapsible, shows summary when collapsed |
   197→| Agent blocks | Left-aligned | Collapsible, includes thinking section |
   198→| Tool blocks | Furthest left | Collapsible, shows tool name + input/output |
   199→| Arrows | SVG layer | Connect user→agent→tools→user flow |
   200→| Index sidebar | Right side | Click to scroll, reflects zoom level |
   201→| Zoom controls | Top-right of main | (+)/(-) adjust detail level |
   202→
   203→### Search Behavior
   204→
   205→```
   206→┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
   207→│  [🔍 Search: "authentication"          ] [◀] [▶]  3 of 12      │
   208→│     ☑ User messages  ☑ Agent messages  ☑ Tool calls            │
   209→└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
   210→```
   211→
   212→| Feature | Behavior |
   213→|---------|----------|
   214→| Search input | Debounced 300ms, searches as you type |
   215→| Result count | Shows "N of M" (current / total matches) |
   216→| Next/Prev | `[◀]` `[▶]` buttons or `↑`/`↓` keys to navigate |
   217→| Filters | Toggle block types to include |
   218→| Highlighting | Current match prominent, other matches subtle |
   219→| Clear | Escape or X clears filter |
   220→
   221→## Theme & Typography
   222→
   223→### Color Palette (Claude Theme)
   224→
   225→| Element | Background | Text |
   226→|---------|------------|------|
   227→| Page background | Orange/peach (Claude brand) | — |
   228→| Agent blocks | Grey (`#374151` / `gray-700`) | Light grey/white (`#f3f4f6`) |
   229→| User blocks | Light grey/white (`#f9fafb`) | Black (`#111827`) |
   230→| Tool/code blocks | Black (`#0f0f0f`) | White terminal (`#e5e5e5`) |
   231→| Header/footer | Semi-transparent dark | White |
   232→| Index sidebar | Orange/peach (same as page) | Light grey/white (`#f3f4f6`) |
   233→| Arrows/connections | Grey (`#6b7280`) | — |
   234→
   235→### Claude Brand Colors Reference
   236→
   237→```css
   238→--claude-orange: #f97316;      /* Primary orange */
   239→--claude-peach: #ffedd5;       /* Light peach background */
   240→--claude-cream: #fff7ed;       /* Lighter variant */
   241→```
   242→
   243→### Typography
   244→
   245→**Font:** Monospace throughout for code-focused feel
   246→
   247→```css
   248→--font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', 'SF Mono', Consolas, monospace;
   249→```
   250→
   251→| Element | Size | Weight |
   252→|---------|------|--------|
   253→| Headers | 1.25rem | 600 |
   254→| Body/content | 0.875rem | 400 |
   255→| Code/tool output | 0.8125rem | 400 |
   256→| Labels/meta | 0.75rem | 500 |
   257→
   258→### Theme System
   259→
   260→Implement as swappable theme via CSS variables and Tailwind config:
   261→
   262→```typescript
   263→// src/ui/themes/index.ts
   264→export interface Theme {
   265→  name: string;
   266→  colors: {
   267→    background: string;
   268→    agentBg: string;
   269→    agentText: string;
   270→    userBg: string;
   271→    userText: string;
   272→    toolBg: string;
   273→    toolText: string;
   274→    accent: string;
   275→  };
   276→}
   277→
   278→export const claudeTheme: Theme = {
   279→  name: 'claude',
   280→  colors: {
   281→    background: '#ffedd5',  // peach
   282→    agentBg: '#374151',     // grey-700
   283→    agentText: '#f3f4f6',   // grey-100
   284→    userBg: '#f9fafb',      // grey-50
   285→    userText: '#111827',    // grey-900
   286→    toolBg: '#0f0f0f',      // near-black
   287→    toolText: '#e5e5e5',    // terminal white
   288→    accent: '#f97316',      // orange
   289→  },
   290→};
   291→```
   292→
   293→Theme can be swapped later by defining new theme objects and applying via React context.
   294→
   295→## CLI Interface
   296→
   297→```
   298→Usage: claude-tracer [options] [session-file]
   299→
   300→Arguments:
   301→  session-file          Path to .jsonl session file (optional)
   302→
   303→Options:
   304→  -p, --port <number>   Port to run server on (default: 3000)
   305→  -h, --help            Show help
   306→  -v, --version         Show version
   307→
   308→Examples:
   309→  claude-tracer                              # Opens session picker
   310→  claude-tracer ./session.jsonl              # Opens specific file in watch mode
   311→  npx claude-tracer ./session.jsonl          # Via npx
   312→```
   313→
   314→**Behavior:**
   315→- No file argument → scan `~/.claude/projects/` → show picker UI
   316→- With file argument → watch file, serve UI, open browser
   317→
   318→## Live Update Loop
   319→
   320→```
   321→Session File (.jsonl)     Node Server              Browser (React)
   322→       │                       │                        │
   323→       │                       │                        │
   324→  Claude appends block         │                        │
   325→       │                       │                        │
   326→       ├── file change ───────▶│                        │
   327→       │                       │ 1. Read new bytes      │
   328→       │                       │ 2. Parse new lines     │
   329→       │                       │ 3. Update chunks       │
   330→       │                       │                        │
   331→       │                       ├── WebSocket push ─────▶│
   332→       │                       │   {type:'blocks:new'}  │
   333→       │                       │                        │
   334→       │                       │        4. Append to state
   335→       │                       │        5. Re-render    │
   336→       │                       │        6. Auto-scroll  │
   337→```
   338→
   339→## Project Structure
   340→
   341→```
   342→claude-tracer/
   343→├── package.json
   344→├── tsconfig.json
   345→├── vite.config.ts
   346→├── tailwind.config.js
   347→│
   348→├── src/
   349→│   ├── types/                # Shared interfaces
   350→│   │   ├── index.ts
   351→│   │   ├── blocks.ts
   352→│   │   ├── chunks.ts
   353→│   │   ├── session.ts
   354→│   │   ├── parser.ts
   355→│   │   └── search.ts
   356→│   │
   357→│   ├── parser/               # JSONL parsing
   358→│   │   ├── index.ts
   359→│   │   ├── base.ts
   360→│   │   ├── claude-code.ts
   361→│   │   └── adapters/
   362→│   │
   363→│   ├── core/                 # Business logic
   364→│   │   ├── index.ts
   365→│   │   ├── chunker.ts
   366→│   │   ├── search.ts
   367→│   │   └── stats.ts
   368→│   │
   369→│   ├── server/               # Node server
   370→│   │   ├── index.ts
   371→│   │   ├── app.ts
   372→│   │   ├── watcher.ts
   373→│   │   ├── websocket.ts
   374→│   │   └── picker.ts
   375→│   │
   376→│   └── ui/                   # React app
   377→│       ├── index.html
   378→│       ├── main.tsx
   379→│       ├── App.tsx
   380→│       ├── components/
   381→│       ├── hooks/
   382→│       └── styles/
   383→│
   384→├── research/
   385→│   └── search-approaches.md
   386→│
   387→└── docs/
   388→    ├── plans/
   389→    └── team-setup.md
   390→```
   391→
   392→## Agent Team Structure
   393→
   394→See `docs/team-setup.md` for full team configuration.
   395→
   396→| Teammate | Owns | Responsibility |
   397→|----------|------|----------------|
   398→| Parser | `src/parser/` | JSONL parsing, pluggable adapters |
   399→| Core | `src/core/` | Chunking, search, stats |
   400→| Server | `src/server/` | Express, WebSocket, file watching |
   401→| UI | `src/ui/` | React components, visualization |
   402→
   403→**Coordination:** `src/types/` is the shared contract. Interface changes coordinated through Team Lead.
   404→
   405→## Future Phases
   406→
   407→### Phase 2: Semantic Search
   408→- Vector embeddings via Transformers.js (MiniLM)
   409→- Hybrid keyword + vector search
   410→- See `research/search-approaches.md`
   411→
   412→### Phase 3: LLM Enhancement
   413→- Ollama integration for "Deep Search"
   414→- "Ask about this session" feature
   415→- Pre-computed block summaries
   416→
   417→### Future Features
   418→- Sub-agent/swarm visualization
   419→- Standalone binary distribution
   420→- Additional format adapters (Codex, Jules)
   421→

file.content:
# Claude-Tracer Design Document

**Date:** 2026-02-18
**Status:** Approved

## Overview

claude-tracer is a standalone trace visualization and debugging tool for Claude Code sessions. It runs locally, parses session JSONL files, and generates an interactive web-based visualizer for stepping through conversation history.

## Goals

- Visualize Claude Code sessions with user prompts, agent reasoning, tool calls, MCP calls
- Show token usage, wall time, timestamps for each block
- Support collapsible UI with hierarchical chunking (theme → task → block)
- Enable semantic navigation via search and index sidebar
- Live-reload when watching active sessions
- Support future formats (Codex, Jules) via pluggable parser

## Non-Goals (for Phase 1)

- Vector/LLM-powered semantic search (Phase 2+)
- Standalone binary distribution
- VS Code extension
- Block rearrangement/editing

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|------------|
| Language | TypeScript |
| UI Framework | React + Vite |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS |
| Server | Node.js + Express |
| Live Updates | WebSocket (ws) |
| File Watching | chokidar |
| Search | MiniSearch |
| Virtual Scrolling | react-window |

## Architecture

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                              claude-tracer                                   │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                             │
│  ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐    ┌─────────────┐  │
│  │   parser/   │    │    core/    │    │   server/   │    │     ui/     │  │
│  │             │    │             │    │             │    │             │  │
│  │ - JSONL     │───▶│ - Blocks    │───▶│ - Express   │───▶│ - React     │  │
│  │ - Adapters  │    │ - Chunks    │    │ - WebSocket │    │ - Tailwind  │  │
│  │             │    │ - Search    │    │ - File watch│    │ - Zoom/Pan  │  │
│  └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘    └─────────────┘  │
│         │                  │                  │                  │          │
│         └──────────────────┴──────────────────┴──────────────────┘          │
│                                     │                                       │
│                              ┌──────▼──────┐                                │
│                              │   types/    │                                │
│                              │  (shared)   │                                │
│                              └─────────────┘                                │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Single Node process** handles:
- Serving static React UI
- File watching (chokidar)
- WebSocket for pushing live updates

## Data Models

### Blocks

```typescript
interface Block {
  id: string;
  timestamp: number;
  type: 'user' | 'agent' | 'tool' | 'mcp';
  parentId?: string;
  tokensIn?: number;
  tokensOut?: number;
  wallTimeMs?: number;
}

interface UserBlock extends Block {
  type: 'user';
  content: string;
}

interface AgentBlock extends Block {
  type: 'agent';
  content: string;
  thinking?: string;
  toolCalls: string[];
}

interface ToolBlock extends Block {
  type: 'tool';
  toolName: string;
  input: unknown;
  output: unknown;
  status: 'pending' | 'success' | 'error';
}

interface McpBlock extends Block {
  type: 'mcp';
  serverName: string;
  method: string;
  input: unknown;
  output: unknown;
  status: 'pending' | 'success' | 'error';
}
```

### Chunks (Hierarchical Grouping)

```typescript
interface Chunk {
  id: string;
  level: 'theme' | 'task' | 'turn';
  label: string;
  blockIds: string[];
  childChunkIds: string[];
  parentChunkId?: string;
  totalTokensIn: number;
  totalTokensOut: number;
  totalWallTimeMs: number;
}
```

**Hierarchy:**
- **Theme** (highest) — High-level goal/conversation topic
- **Task** — TODO item Claude is working on
- **Turn** (lowest) — Individual user↔agent exchange

### Parser Interface

```typescript
interface TraceParser {
  parse(content: string): ParsedSession;
  parseLine(line: string): Block;
}

interface ParsedSession {
  id: string;
  filePath: string;
  blocks: Block[];
  chunks: Chunk[];
  metadata: SessionMetadata;
}
```

## UI Design

### Layout

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  # tracer                    [🔍 Search / Filter]                           │
├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┬─────────────┤
│                                               [−] [+]         │  INDEX      │
│                                                               │             │
│                              ┌───────────────────────────┐    │  ○ Task 1   │
│                              │ ▸ user                    │    │  ● Task 2   │
│                              │   "Help me implement…"    │    │  ○ Task 3   │
│                              └─────────────┬─────────────┘    │             │
│                                            │                  │             │
│                    ┌───────────────────────┘                  │ (scrollable)│
│                    ▼                                          │             │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────┐                          │             │
│  │ ▸ agent                         │                          │             │
│  │   "I'll start by exploring…"    │                          │             │
│  └─┬───────────────────────────────┘                          │             │
│    │                                                          │             │
│    ├────────┬────────┬────────┐                               │             │
│    ▼        ▼        ▼        ▼                               │             │
│  ┌──────┐┌──────┐┌──────┐┌──────┐                             │             │
│  │ Read ││ Grep ││ Bash ││ Edit │                             │             │
│  └──────┘└──────┘└──────┘└──────┘                             │             │
│    │        │        │        │                               │             │
│    └────────┴────────┴────────┘                               │             │
│                    │                                          │             │
│                    └───────────────────────┐                  │             │
│                                            ▼                  │             │
│                              ┌───────────────────────────┐    │             │
│                              │ ▸ user                    │    │             │
│                              └───────────────────────────┘    │             │
│                                                               │             │
├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┴─────────────┤
│  Block 12 of 47  │  Tokens: 2,341 in / 892 out  │  ⚙ Settings               │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Key UI Elements

| Element | Alignment | Behavior |
|---------|-----------|----------|
| User blocks | Right-aligned | Collapsible, shows summary when collapsed |
| Agent blocks | Left-aligned | Collapsible, includes thinking section |
| Tool blocks | Furthest left | Collapsible, shows tool name + input/output |
| Arrows | SVG layer | Connect user→agent→tools→user flow |
| Index sidebar | Right side | Click to scroll, reflects zoom level |
| Zoom controls | Top-right of main | (+)/(-) adjust detail level |

### Search Behavior

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  [🔍 Search: "authentication"          ] [◀] [▶]  3 of 12      │
│     ☑ User messages  ☑ Agent messages  ☑ Tool calls            │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

| Feature | Behavior |
|---------|----------|
| Search input | Debounced 300ms, searches as you type |
| Result count | Shows "N of M" (current / total matches) |
| Next/Prev | `[◀]` `[▶]` buttons or `↑`/`↓` keys to navigate |
| Filters | Toggle block types to include |
| Highlighting | Current match prominent, other matches subtle |
| Clear | Escape or X clears filter |

## Theme & Typography

### Color Palette (Claude Theme)

| Element | Background | Text |
|---------|------------|------|
| Page background | Orange/peach (Claude brand) | — |
| Agent blocks | Grey (`#374151` / `gray-700`) | Light grey/white (`#f3f4f6`) |
| User blocks | Light grey/white (`#f9fafb`) | Black (`#111827`) |
| Tool/code blocks | Black (`#0f0f0f`) | White terminal (`#e5e5e5`) |
| Header/footer | Semi-transparent dark | White |
| Index sidebar | Orange/peach (same as page) | Light grey/white (`#f3f4f6`) |
| Arrows/connections | Grey (`#6b7280`) | — |

### Claude Brand Colors Reference

```css
--claude-orange: #f97316;      /* Primary orange */
--claude-peach: #ffedd5;       /* Light peach background */
--claude-cream: #fff7ed;       /* Lighter variant */
```

### Typography

**Font:** Monospace throughout for code-focused feel

```css
--font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', 'SF Mono', Consolas, monospace;
```

| Element | Size | Weight |
|---------|------|--------|
| Headers | 1.25rem | 600 |
| Body/content | 0.875rem | 400 |
| Code/tool output | 0.8125rem | 400 |
| Labels/meta | 0.75rem | 500 |

### Theme System

Implement as swappable theme via CSS variables and Tailwind config:

```typescript
// src/ui/themes/index.ts
export interface Theme {
  name: string;
  colors: {
    background: string;
    agentBg: string;
    agentText: string;
    userBg: string;
    userText: string;
    toolBg: string;
    toolText: string;
    accent: string;
  };
}

export const claudeTheme: Theme = {
  name: 'claude',
  colors: {
    background: '#ffedd5',  // peach
    agentBg: '#374151',     // grey-700
    agentText: '#f3f4f6',   // grey-100
    userBg: '#f9fafb',      // grey-50
    userText: '#111827',    // grey-900
    toolBg: '#0f0f0f',      // near-black
    toolText: '#e5e5e5',    // terminal white
    accent: '#f97316',      // orange
  },
};
```

Theme can be swapped later by defining new theme objects and applying via React context.

## CLI Interface

```
Usage: claude-tracer [options] [session-file]

Arguments:
  session-file          Path to .jsonl session file (optional)

Options:
  -p, --port <number>   Port to run server on (default: 3000)
  -h, --help            Show help
  -v, --version         Show version

Examples:
  claude-tracer                              # Opens session picker
  claude-tracer ./session.jsonl              # Opens specific file in watch mode
  npx claude-tracer ./session.jsonl          # Via npx
```

**Behavior:**
- No file argument → scan `~/.claude/projects/` → show picker UI
- With file argument → watch file, serve UI, open browser

## Live Update Loop

```
Session File (.jsonl)     Node Server              Browser (React)
       │                       │                        │
       │                       │                        │
  Claude appends block         │                        │
       │                       │                        │
       ├── file change ───────▶│                        │
       │                       │ 1. Read new bytes      │
       │                       │ 2. Parse new lines     │
       │                       │ 3. Update chunks       │
       │                       │                        │
       │                       ├── WebSocket push ─────▶│
       │                       │   {type:'blocks:new'}  │
       │                       │                        │
       │                       │        4. Append to state
       │                       │        5. Re-render    │
       │                       │        6. Auto-scroll  │
```

## Project Structure

```
claude-tracer/
├── package.json
├── tsconfig.json
├── vite.config.ts
├── tailwind.config.js
│
├── src/
│   ├── types/                # Shared interfaces
│   │   ├── index.ts
│   │   ├── blocks.ts
│   │   ├── chunks.ts
│   │   ├── session.ts
│   │   ├── parser.ts
│   │   └── search.ts
│   │
│   ├── parser/               # JSONL parsing
│   │   ├── index.ts
│   │   ├── base.ts
│   │   ├── claude-code.ts
│   │   └── adapters/
│   │
│   ├── core/                 # Business logic
│   │   ├── index.ts
│   │   ├── chunker.ts
│   │   ├── search.ts
│   │   └── stats.ts
│   │
│   ├── server/               # Node server
│   │   ├── index.ts
│   │   ├── app.ts
│   │   ├── watcher.ts
│   │   ├── websocket.ts
│   │   └── picker.ts
│   │
│   └── ui/                   # React app
│       ├── index.html
│       ├── main.tsx
│       ├── App.tsx
│       ├── components/
│       ├── hooks/
│       └── styles/
│
├── research/
│   └── search-approaches.md
│
└── docs/
    ├── plans/
    └── team-setup.md
```

## Agent Team Structure

See `docs/team-setup.md` for full team configuration.

| Teammate | Owns | Responsibility |
|----------|------|----------------|
| Parser | `src/parser/` | JSONL parsing, pluggable adapters |
| Core | `src/core/` | Chunking, search, stats |
| Server | `src/server/` | Express, WebSocket, file watching |
| UI | `src/ui/` | React components, visualization |

**Coordination:** `src/types/` is the shared contract. Interface changes coordinated through Team Lead.

## Future Phases

### Phase 2: Semantic Search
- Vector embeddings via Transformers.js (MiniLM)
- Hybrid keyword + vector search
- See `research/search-approaches.md`

### Phase 3: LLM Enhancement
- Ollama integration for "Deep Search"
- "Ask about this session" feature
- Pre-computed block summaries

### Future Features
- Sub-agent/swarm visualization
- Standalone binary distribution
- Additional format adapters (Codex, Jules)

content.text:
Now I'll fix all the lint errors:

1. **`no-confusing-void-expression`** - onClick handlers returning void from arrow shorthand (lines 26 in UserBlock, 27 in AgentBlock, 31 in ToolBlock, 23 in Header)
2. **`no-unsafe-assignment`** - `event.data` is `any` in useSession line 37
3. **`no-non-null-assertion`** - `message.blocks!` in useSession line 52, and `document.getElementById('root')!` in main.tsx line 6

Task #4 (Phase 5: UI module) is complete. Here's what was implemented:

**5 commits pushed to main:**

1. `feat(ui): add Claude theme and ThemeContext` - `src/ui/themes/claude.ts` and `src/ui/themes/index.ts` with theme colors and React context

4. `feat(ui): add Header, Footer, IndexSidebar, and TraceView components` - Layout components including search bar placeholder, block count, connection status, chunk navigation

content.content:
Task #4: Phase 5: Implement UI module
Status: completed
Description: Implement the React UI in src/ui/. Read the full implementation plan at docs/plans/2026-02-18-claude-tracer-implementation.md (Phase 5, starting around line 2068) and the design doc at docs/plans/2026-02-18-claude-tracer-design.md for UI layout and theme colors. Tasks: (1) Create Claude theme in src/ui/themes/claude.ts and ThemeContext in src/ui/themes/index.ts. (2) Create useSession hook in src/ui/hooks/useSession.ts - WebSocket connection, block/chunk state management. (3) Create layout components: Header.tsx (with search bar placeholder), Footer.tsx (block count, connection status), IndexSidebar.tsx (chunk navigation). (4) Create block components: UserBlock.tsx (right-aligned, light bg), AgentBlock.tsx (left-aligned, grey bg), ToolBlock.tsx (furthest left, dark bg). All collapsible. (5) Create TraceView.tsx to compose blocks. (6) Update App.tsx to use all components. Note: src/ui/main.tsx, App.tsx, index.html, and styles/globals.css already exist - update them as needed rather than creating from scratch. Commit each sub-task separately. Push when done.

task.subject: Phase 5: Implement UI module
task.description: Implement the React UI in src/ui/. Read the full implementation plan at docs/plans/2026-02-18-claude-tracer-implementation.md (Phase 5, starting around line 2068) and the design doc at docs/plans/2026-02-18-claude-tracer-design.md for UI layout and theme colors. Tasks: (1) Create Claude theme in src/ui/themes/claude.ts and ThemeContext in src/ui/themes/index.ts. (2) Create useSession hook in src/ui/hooks/useSession.ts - WebSocket connection, block/chunk state management. (3) Create layout components: Header.tsx (with search bar placeholder), Footer.tsx (block count, connection status), IndexSidebar.tsx (chunk navigation). (4) Create block components: UserBlock.tsx (right-aligned, light bg), AgentBlock.tsx (left-aligned, grey bg), ToolBlock.tsx (furthest left, dark bg). All collapsible. (5) Create TraceView.tsx to compose blocks. (6) Update App.tsx to use all components. Note: src/ui/main.tsx, App.tsx, index.html, and styles/globals.css already exist - update them as needed rather than creating from scratch. Commit each sub-task separately. Push when done.
